text.tspan: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — standard schemdraw schematic
U1 is shown as physical DIP-14 top view: notch up, pin 1 upper-left, pin 14 upper-right
/OE pins are active-low: pins 1/4 to GND enable used channels; pins 10/13 to +5V_LOGIC disable unused channels
Meter before power: +12V_PROTECTED ↔ +5V_LOGIC = open/megaohms; all GND points ≈0Ω; U1 pin 14 gets USB-derived +5V only.
Full LED current stays off solderless breadboard. 1N5822 is prototype/current-limited only, not final multi-amp protection.
